properties.Description: A stunning Republican-style colonial villa in the heart of Cartagena's Walled City, blending centuries-old history with contemporary luxury. With 7 en-suite bedrooms sleeping 16 guests, a private pool, and jacuzzi, it consistently ranks in Airbnb's top 5% of homes with 54 five-star reviews. Steps from Cartagena's best restaurants, rooftop bars, and historic plazas.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: The Walled City is Cartagena's UNESCO World Heritage historic center — cobblestone streets, colonial mansions with grand balconies, and centuries-old churches and plazas. Walking distance to the city's best restaurants, rooftop bars, and boutique shopping. The quintessential Cartagena experience for clients who want history, culture, and nightlife right outside their door.

properties.Name: Isla Cala Mambo
properties.Neighborhood Summary: The Rosario Islands are a protected archipelago about 45 minutes by boat from Cartagena's coast — a string of small coral islands surrounded by crystal-clear Caribbean water. This is where Cartagena's boat-and-beach lifestyle reaches its peak: private islands, overwater decks, snorkeling, and total disconnection from the city. The islands range from rustic to ultra-luxury. Best for day trips, multi-day island stays, or groups celebrating something special who want a once-in-a-lifetime setting.
properties.Tags: Cartagena, Island, Rosario Islands, Up to 14 pax

properties.Name: Casa 1537
properties.Description:
A historic and versatile venue in the heart of Cartagena, where every space tells a story. From grand colonial halls to intimate terraces with views of the cathedral and clock tower, it offers multiple settings for weddings of all sizes. Perfect if you’re looking for a place that blends history, scale, and flexibility while keeping the magic of the old city in every moment.

Casa 1537 offers multiple spaces that adapt to different moments of your wedding, from large celebrations to more intimate settings:
• Salón San Cosme y Damián: 350 – 800 guests
• Salón Juan Bautista Mainero y Trucco: 80 – 280 guests
• Salón San Sebastián: 80 – 180 guests
• Salón San Carlos Borromeo: 38 – 100 guests
• Patio Central: 74 – 80 guests
Ideal if you want the flexibility to design different environments within the same venue.

properties.Description:
Nestled in the heart of Cartagena’s vibrant Getsemaní neighborhood, Casa Santos de Piedra is a captivating colonial venue that seamlessly blends historic charm with modern elegance. Its beautifully preserved architecture—featuring handcrafted iron chandeliers, arched brickwork, and marble accents—creates a romantic ambiance reminiscent of Cartagena’s rich heritage.

With a spacious main hall accommodating up to 250 guests and a rooftop terrace offering panoramic views, the venue provides versatile spaces for both grand celebrations and intimate gatherings. The fully equipped kitchen facilitates seamless catering, while the venue’s flexible policies allow couples to personalize every detail of their special day.

properties.Name: Charleston Santa Teresa
properties.Description:
The Charleston Santa Teresa Hotel, located within the walls of Cartagena’s historic old city, offers a https://two.travel/cartagena-wedding-venues/ that seamlessly combines luxury, history, and elegance. Housed in a beautifully restored 17th-century convent, the hotel exudes an air of timeless sophistication, making it an exceptional Cartagena wedding venue for couples seeking a venue with deep historical roots and breathtaking architecture. The hotel’s colonial charm is evident in every detail, from its grand arches and stone walls to its elegantly appointed rooms, providing a backdrop that is both romantic and refined.
At Santa Teresa Hotel, you and your guests will be immersed in the rich culture and history of Cartagena, while enjoying modern luxury and world-class service. The combination of stunning surroundings, exceptional hospitality, and a prime location within the UNESCO World Heritage Site makes this venue a dream choice for a destination wedding.

Espacios para eventos:
Hotel Arsenal
• Terraza Jardín: Cóctel hasta 100 personas | Banquete hasta 70 personas.
• Terraza Arsenal (vista a ciudad amurallada): Cóctel 70–80 personas | Banquete hasta 60 personas
• Terraza Mirador (5° piso, vista a bahía): Coctel 25 personas, cenas pequeñas (2 mesas imperiales para 10 pax c/u).
• Restaurante Corozo y Timbal (aire acondicionado): Capacidad 50–55 personas.
Hotel San Lázaro
• Restaurante que se puede unir con terraza con vista al Castillo de San Felipe: Cóctel 50 personas (ampliable a 80). Algunas áreas con aire acondicionado, otras sin.

Comisiones:

• Alojamiento: 10% antes de impuestos (sobre tarifa negociada).
◦ Por más de 15 habitaciones: 1 habitación de cortesía (decisión de uso nuestra).
• Alimentos y bebidas (A&B): 5% antes de impuestos. No aplica sobre exclusividad ni servicio (meseros).
• Uso de espacios: No aplica comisión (hay consumo mínimo).

Hotel El Marques is an exquisite wedding venue nestled in the heart of Cartagena’s historic Walled City, offering a perfect blend of colonial charm and modern elegance. This boutique hotel, housed in a beautifully preserved 18th-century mansion, provides a stunning setting for couples seeking a romantic and memorable wedding experience.

The venue boasts a variety of unique spaces ideal for every part of your celebration, from the ceremony to the reception. The lush inner courtyard, adorned with vibrant tropical plants and a serene fountain, creates an intimate atmosphere for exchanging vows. For larger gatherings, the elegant indoor salons, featuring high ceilings and traditional colonial architecture, provide a sophisticated ambiance for your reception.

properties.Neighborhood Summary: The Rosario Islands are a protected archipelago about 45 minutes by boat from Cartagena's coast — a string of small coral islands surrounded by crystal-clear Caribbean water. This is where Cartagena's boat-and-beach lifestyle reaches its peak: private islands, overwater decks, snorkeling, and total disconnection from the city. The islands range from rustic to ultra-luxury. Best for day trips, multi-day island stays, or groups celebrating something special who want a once-in-a-lifetime setting.

properties.Neighborhood Summary:
Laureles is one of the most iconic and beloved neighborhoods within the city of Medellín itself. In 2023, it was famously named the "Coolest Neighborhood in the World" by Time Out magazine.

properties.Description: A stunning, architecturally designed gem located on a private bay in Guatapé, Antioquia, hosting up to 6 guests. This unique lakefront property features an impressive structure with glass walls, 20-foot ceilings, and panoramic nature views. The layout includes an expansive upper level with a fully appointed chef's kitchen, a dining area, and a panoramic living space with a custom sofa bed, while the lower level houses an indoor garden and 2 queen bedrooms, each featuring workspace, a television, an ensuite bathroom, and a private balcony. Accessed via a 100-meter meandering path through the trees, this quiet retreat offers direct lake access just 10 minutes from town.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Guatapé is a colorful lakeside town about 2 hours east of Medellín — famous for the iconic Peñón rock, stunning reservoir views, and vibrant hand-painted facades. A popular day trip that also works as an overnight escape with lakefront fincas and water sports. Best for groups adding a nature experience to their Medellín trip — boat tours, jet skis, hiking, and small-town charm.

properties.Description: A stunning contemporary 8-bedroom, 9.5-bathroom luxury villa located in a prestigious, peaceful community in Envigado, hosting up to 16+ guests. Designed for an upscale and fun-filled group retreat, this expansive property features a sparkling swimming pool, a private soccer field, a pool table, and a premium sound system. The light-filled interiors open up to a massive private backyard with sun loungers and breathtaking nature views—all while offering a 24/7 on-site concierge and a strategic location just 15 minutes away from Provenza and Parque Lleras in El Poblado. Best for groups who prefer a quieter, more residential base with easy access to the city.

properties.Description: A spectacular 2-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom hilltop home located on the exclusive Los Naranjos peninsula in Guatapé, Antioquia, hosting up to 5 guests. Winner of the SARA NY Design Award of Honor and featured in AXXIS Architectural Magazine, this modern, hand-poured concrete house features a wood-burning fireplace, an open-concept kitchen, an outdoor terrace with a hot tub, and a rooftop balcony with 360-degree lake and mountain views. Set on a quiet, private 4-acre property, guests enjoy direct lake access, 1km of trails, two shared docks, and complimentary use of kayaks and paddleboards—all just 10 minutes from town.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Guatapé is a colorful lakeside town about 2 hours east of Medellín — famous for the iconic Peñón rock, stunning reservoir views, and vibrant hand-painted facades. A popular day trip that also works as an overnight escape with lakefront fincas and water sports. Best for groups adding a nature experience to their Medellín trip — boat tours, jet skis, hiking, and small-town charm.

properties.Neighborhood Summary:
Copacabana, Colombia, is a mountain-centric—experience.
Located about 10 miles (15 km) north of Medellín, Copacabana is a charming municipality in the Aburrá Valley. Often called the "Founder's Village" (Pueblo Fundador), it offers a more relaxed, traditional pace of life compared to the high-energy bustle of the city.

properties.Description: Spacious luxury apartment with 5 bedrooms and 7 beds, located in the exclusive Zeta Erre Building, in front of the Click Clack Hotel in Provenza, the most vibrant area of Medellín.It has a private terrace, a bathroom in each room, air conditioning, hot water, private parking and 24-hour security.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Provenza is the beating heart of Medellín's nightlife and dining scene — a walkable strip of rooftop bars, world-class restaurants, and buzzing energy that draws locals and visitors alike. Think bottle-service terraces, late-night DJ sets, and chef-driven Colombian-fusion dining. The most sought-after address in the city for bachelor parties and group trips who want to be in the center of the action.
properties.Notes:
Pros:
* Good location.
* The house is in good condition.
* It offers security and 24/7 assistance via host chat.
* The place is nice, has the essentials, and is party-friendly. Especially apartment 503, which is very spacious.
* Overall, I liked it!
Cons:
* Strict schedule: the house was only ready by 2:00 p.m., and early check-in was not allowed.
* There is no secure place to store luggage in case of early arrivals. No guest restroom is available at the reception area (a drawback for guests arriving before check-in time).
* One of the hosts, Lily, was hard to talk to. She is very rude.
* There are no kitchen utensils available for cooking, which limits guests who prefer to prepare their own meals.
* No laundry machine.
properties.Tags: Medellín, Villa, Provenza, Yes, 5 bedrooms, Up to 12 pax, AC, Billiards Table, Chef Kitchen, Parking, WiFi

properties.Amenities: AC, BBQ, Bachelor Friendly, Chef Kitchen, Cleaning Included, Game Room, Garden, Gym, Home Theater, Jacuzzi, Parking, Pet Friendly, Pool, Rooftop, Security, Sound System, Washer/Dryer, WiFi
properties.Description: Huge modern Mediterranean mansion hidden paradise in nature in the heart of El Poblado.Celebrate with your friends in two spectacular pools designed for pool parties, DJs and large open spaces ideal for private dinners or chill.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Lomas de Los Balsos sits in the hills above Poblado — Medellín's most exclusive residential enclave with sweeping valley views and sprawling luxury estates. A 10-minute drive to Provenza's restaurants and nightlife. The properties here are the biggest and most impressive in the city — think private pools, massive gardens, and full staff. Best for large groups and high-end clients who prioritize space, privacy, and jaw-dropping properties over walkability.
properties.Notes:
Pros:
* The house has different areas to change the vibe depending on the moment. It has two BBQs, a large terrace, and a fireplace.
* Good location with an excellent view. It has the best view among all the houses.
* There are three staff members: host, butler, and cleaning person.
* Good wifi throughout the house.

Cons:
* The house is old and dirty. There are several spaces full of dirt.
* It has a small, hidden kitchen without enough utensils or equipment to prepare full dinners.
* The bed sheets and linens are old and worn out; there are only comforters without duvet covers.
* The design is unattractive and not cozy. The place is pretty good for Instagram, but it's not comfortable.

I feel that this house has the same issue as many houses here in Medellín. They’re prepared for clients who want to throw wild parties, but they’re not ready for clients who want to party with good taste and class.

properties.Notes:
Mansión Lleras is a property managed by Alta Gama, ideal for groups looking for a party atmosphere (not recommended for families).
Main features:
* Location: In the same building as Gusto Club, right in Parque Lleras. Despite the proximity, no noise can be heard inside the apartment or the rooms.
* Service: 24-hour butler available to handle basic needs and control guest entry. Requests made to the butler were fulfilled.
* Comfort: The house is spacious and comfortable for groups. It's very similar to the photos.
Important notes:
* High turnover of butlers, and they are generally not bilingual.
* This is a party house, not intended for families.
* Cons: Presence of cockroaches and less-than-ideal cleanliness during the stay.

Known for its stunning cenotes, Mayan ruins overlooking the sea, and a beach road lined with design-forward hotels, world-class restaurants, and DJ-driven beach clubs. The vibe is barefoot elegance — think organic mezcal cocktails, yoga at sunrise, and sunset dinners in the sand. Best for groups who want a premium beach escape with wellness, nightlife, and Instagram-worthy everything.

properties.Neighborhood Summary: Condesa is Mexico City's green oasis — built around the beautiful Parque México and Parque España. properties.Neighborhood Summary: Roma Sur is Roma Norte's quieter, more residential southern half — same beautiful architecture and tree-lined streets at a more relaxed pace. A hotspot for specialty coffee shops, natural wine bars, and chef-driven casual restaurants that haven't been discovered by tourist crowds yet. More local and laid-back than Roma Norte, but just a 10-minute walk from all the action. Best for groups who want the Roma aesthetic and walkability without being in the thick of the weekend crowds.

properties.Neighborhood Summary: Polanco is Mexico City's most exclusive neighborhood — the Beverly Hills of CDMX. Home to top luxury hotels, flagship designer boutiques along Avenida Presidente Masaryk, and some of the highest-rated restaurants in the world including Pujol and Quintonil. Chapultepec Park borders the neighborhood. The vibe is upscale, corporate, and family-friendly during the day, with excellent fine dining at night. Best for groups who want luxury, world-class dining, and a polished, safe environment — ideal for corporate retreats and high-end clients.
properties.Tags: CDMX, Villa, Polanco, No, 4 bedrooms, Up to 10 pax, Baby-Friendly, Elevator, Parking, Rooftop, Security, Terrace/Balcony, Washer/Dryer, WiFi

properties.Description: A vibrant, extra-spacious 5-bedroom, 4.5-bathroom house located in the quiet and safe Anzures neighborhood of Mexico City, comfortably hosting 16+ guests across 10 beds. The property features a fully equipped kitchen with unique bright green cabinetry, a bright open living room, high-speed Wi-Fi, a dedicated workspace, and an in-unit washer/dryer. Its standout feature is a private rooftop terrace complete with a BBQ grill, outdoor dining, and city views (offering sheltered seating options for any weather). It is within easy walking distance of Paseo de la Reforma, Chapultepec museums, local cafés, and markets, and just a short ride to Polanco or Roma Norte.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Anzures is a residential neighborhood nestled between Polanco and Reforma — quiet, safe, and well-connected with easy access to both business and leisure districts. About 15 minutes from Roma Norte by car or a quick Uber ride. Larger properties available at better value than neighboring Polanco. Best for groups who want spacious accommodations in a central, low-key location without paying Polanco premiums.

properties.Tags: CDMX, Villa, Roma Sur, Yes, 6 bedrooms, Up to 16 pax, AC, BBQ, Gym, Rooftop, Washer/Dryer, WiFi

properties.Description: A 6-bedroom Roma Sur home with rooftop terrace featuring outdoor dining for 14, BBQ grill, and a cozy lounge. Features on-site gym, AC, heating, high-speed WiFi, washer/dryer, and a safe. Sleeps up to 16 guests. Rated 5-stars.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Condesa is Mexico City's green oasis — built around the beautiful Parque México and Parque España. Stunning 1920s art deco buildings, wide jacaranda-lined boulevards, and effortlessly stylish cafe culture. One of the most walkable neighborhoods in the city, with excellent brunch spots, cocktail bars, and boutique shopping. More relaxed and polished than Roma — think European-style sidewalk dining and morning jogs around the park. Best for groups who want a sophisticated, walkable base with parks, dining, and a more refined pace.
properties.Tags: CDMX, Villa, Roma Sur, Yes, 6 bedrooms, Up to 16 pax, AC, Chef Kitchen, Security, Washer/Dryer, WiFi

properties.Description: A private full-floor condo in Anzures, Mexico City, exclusively for your group — 10 bedrooms with 10 en-suite bathrooms, sleeping up to 16 guests. Features a private rooftop with an open kitchen, bar, and seated dining for 20. No other residents or guests share the space. Rated 4-stars.
properties.Neighborhood Summary: Anzures is a residential neighborhood nestled between Polanco and Reforma — quiet, safe, and well-connected with easy access to both business and leisure districts. About 15 minutes from Roma Norte by car or a quick Uber ride. Larger properties available at better value than neighboring Polanco. Best for groups who want spacious accommodations in a central, low-key location without paying Polanco premiums.

properties.Description:
A stunning hacienda-style 4-bedroom, 5.5-bathroom luxury villa in the prestigious Cabo del Sol community of Cabo San Lucas, Mexico, hosting up to 10 guests (5 beds).
It features a private pool, a hot tub, an outdoor terrace under a spacious palapa with dining and lounging furniture, a fire pit, and panoramic views of the ocean and golf course. Indoors, it includes a gourmet kitchen, an elegant living room with a fireplace, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a versatile TV room with a sofa bed that can function as a 5th bedroom. Located just minutes from pristine beaches and world-class golf courses.
